title: Brand Pot Branding & Logo Animation
body:
Brand Pot required a focused and scalable identity built with clarity and restraint.
Key considerations:
• Limited color palette for stronger brand recall
• Clear typographic hierarchy
• Balanced visual weight
• Digital adaptability
The logo animation was designed as a natural extension of the identity system, reinforcing brand personality through controlled motion.
Available for branding, UI/UX and presentation design projects.

title: Mobcast Platform UX/UI Case Study
body:
This project showcases the UX and UI design of Mobcast, a live employee engagement and learning platform used to streamline communication, training, and performance tracking within organizations.

The objective was to design a system that simplifies complex enterprise workflows while keeping the experience engaging and easy to navigate for employees across different roles.

The approach focused on:

• Structuring clear and intuitive user journeys for content consumption and interaction
• Building a scalable and modular design system
• Creating a balance between functionality and visual engagement

The case study highlights:

• Information architecture and user flow design
• Wireframes and interaction patterns
• Visual design system including typography and color strategy
• Feature design for learning modules, communication, and analytics
• Scalable UI components aligned with real product requirements

This design was successfully implemented and brought to life as a functional product, demonstrating practical UX thinking and real-world usability.
#uxdesign #uidesign #productdesign #saasdesign #enterprisedesign #designsystem #casestudy #realproduct #livedesign #webdesign #mobiledesign #userexperience #dashboarddesign #learningplatform #employeeengagement

title: Family Profiling UX and UI for a Finance Platform
desc: Part of a larger finance platform, this module focuses on managing family member profiles with a clear and structured onboarding flow.
body:
This project was part of a larger financial platform designed to manage investments and user profiles.

The focus here was on the family profiling module, allowing users to create and manage financial profiles for multiple family members within a single account.

Designed in 2015, the goal was to simplify a complex onboarding process involving personal details, document uploads and risk profiling into a structured and easy to follow experience.

Key considerations:

• Breaking down complex financial workflows into guided steps
• Managing multiple user profiles within one system
• Simplifying compliance and documentation flows
• Providing clear visibility of profile completion

title: Product Booklet Design for Illume Lights
desc: A well designed brochure does more than present products. It communicates the brand, builds trust, and guides the reader through the story of the company. For IllumeLights, the goal was to create a modern product brochure that feels premium, structured, and visually engaging while remaining highly functional for product comparison and specification reference.
body:
This 16 page brochure was designed to highlight IllumeLights' lighting solutions in a way that balances aesthetics with clarity. The layout focuses on strong visual hierarchy, clean typography, and carefully structured product tables so customers can easily scan specifications and product variations.
The design works effectively for:
• Product catalog distribution
• Dealer presentations
• Sales meetings
• Print and digital viewing
Designed by
Carving Dezine
Brand Identity | Brochure Design | Product Catalog Design
If you are looking to create brand identities, brochures, product catalogs, or marketing materials, feel free to get in touch.
Email: carvingdezine@gmail.com
